source_policy: Current official Chemistry Surfboards model descriptions and governed canonical profiles are authoritative. Public family reflects manufacturer design intent. Board DNA describes behaviour but does not determine identity.

models.manufacturer_intent: Chemistry identifies the B Side as the highest-performance shortboard in its range, with its deepest single concave and most accelerated rocker.
models.editorial_reason: The board is explicitly designed as Chemistry's most technical and performance-oriented shortboard.

models.manufacturer_intent: Accessible, versatile board intended to make everyday and weaker surf enjoyable while retaining responsive shortboard performance.
models.editorial_reason: Its broad usability and everyday small-wave role are primary, rather than competition performance or pure grovelling.
